title: Spaghetti Bolognese
description: Classic Italian pasta dish made with ground beef and tomato sauce. A hearty and flavorful recipe perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook pasta according to package instructions.
In a large skillet, cook Italian sausage over medium-high heat, breaking it up with a spoon, until browned and cooked through.
Add onion and garlic to the skillet and cook until softened.
Add tomato sauce to the skillet and stir to combine.
Simmer the sauce over medium-low heat for 10-15 minutes.
Drain the pasta and add it to the skillet with the sauce.
Toss the pasta in the sauce until well coated.
